name: Aaron Boone
transactions: June 3, 1991:Drafted by theCalifornia Angelsin the43rd roundof the 1991 amateur draft, but did not sign.
June 2, 1994:Drafted by theCincinnati Redsin the3rd roundof the 1994 amateur draft. Player signed June 7, 1994.
July 31, 2003:Traded by theCincinnati Redsto theNew York YankeesforBrandon Claussen,Charlie Manningand cash.
June 26, 2004:Signed as a Free Agent with theCleveland Indians.
December 29, 2006:Signed as a Free Agent with theFlorida Marlins.
December 6, 2007:Signed as a Free Agent with theWashington Nationals.
December 18, 2008:Signed as a Free Agent with theHouston Astros.
